    <item>
        <guid>nba530449</guid>
        <title>Julius Randle: Cools off in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/julius-randle-3574</link>
        <description>Randle produced 12 points (4-10 FG, 0-2 3Pt, 4-5 FT), five rebounds, two assists and two steals in 27 minutes during Wednesday's 133-95 loss to the Spurs in Game 2 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 06 May 2026 9:54:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530448</guid>
        <title>Victor Wembanyama: Another Strong showing Wednesday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/victor-wembanyama-5809</link>
        <description>Wembanyama finished with 19 points (7-15 FG, 2-7 3Pt, 3-3 FT), 15 rebounds, two assists, one steal and two blocks across 26 minutes in Wednesday's 133-95 win over Minnesota in Game 2 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 06 May 2026 9:45:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530446</guid>
        <title>Ayo Dosunmu: Questionable to return to Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/ayo-dosunmu-5337</link>
        <description>Dosunmu is questionable to return to Wednesday's Game 2 matchup with the Spurs due to right heel pain.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 06 May 2026 8:16:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530443</guid>
        <title>Tyrese Maxey: Nets 26 points with six assists</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/tyrese-maxey-5158</link>
        <description>Maxey closed Wednesday's 108-102 loss to New York in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals with 26 points (9-23 FG, 1-6 3Pt, 7-9 FT), three rebounds, six assists and one steal in 47 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 06 May 2026 7:48:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530440</guid>
        <title>Karl-Anthony Towns: Double-doubles with seven dimes</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/karl-anthony-towns-3741</link>
        <description>Towns ended Wednesday's 108-102 win over the 76ers in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals with 20 points (6-8 FG, 1-1 3Pt, 7-9 FT), 10 rebounds, seven assists and one steal over 27 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 06 May 2026 7:47:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
